docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY AGUIRRE, RICHARD AGUIRRE, JENA AS TO DEFENDANT ZERGA, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT ZERGA, JAMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-10-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $310.76 AS TO DEFENDANT ZERGA, JAMES

REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON APR-01-26. SC-100 OR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO JAMES ZERGA VIA COURT CERTIFIED MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS RICHARD AGUIRRE & JENA AGUIRRE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES ZERGA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE, RICHARD AGUIRRE, JENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZERGA, JAMES $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE, RICHARD AGUIRRE, JENA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZERGA, JAMES
